details.test: Task 1: Buy two mid-priced London Dry gin bottles
Task 2: Create gin & tonic bundle under $80 (1 gin, 2 tonics, 1 garnish)
Task 3: Start 3-month gin subscription under $150 with standard shipping
Task 4: Find quick citrus flagship cocktail and add gin + garnish to cart
Task 5: Order three premium gin gift sets with gift messages
Task 6: Use two-bottle promo to buy two different full-size gins
Task 7: Buy limited-edition gin (40–45% ABV, under $70) with recommended garnish
Task 8: Choose cheaper shipping option for single bottle checkout
Task 9: Book distillery tour/tasting in April 2026 under $60 for two people
